name: pokerpath
description: PokerPath — aprenda poker como um jogo. Monorepo (web + api + shared).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @pokerpath/api" "npm run dev -w @pokerpath/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pokerpath/shared && npm run build -w @pokerpath/api && npm run build -w @pokerpath/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run typecheck:tests
